assertions.text: Output contains the rewritten text followed by a tone shift note describing what changed
All facts, data, and figures from the original text are preserved exactly
Output includes a word count comparison line

assertion_results.note: Rewritten text followed by tone shift note identifying vocabulary, sentence structure, and voice changes
All facts preserved: bus network review, route planning, frequency scheduling, accessibility compliance, Q4 timeline
Word count comparison line present showing original and rewritten counts
Rewritten text with tone shift note present despite minimal input
12% decline and supply chain/consumer confidence causes preserved
Tone shift note describes conversion from EU regulatory language to plain-language explainer
All regulatory details preserved: Annex II, recyclability criteria, 18-month transposition, Article 258 TFEU
